title: Strict Typing, Nullability, and Boundary Validation · Gate Lens: Typing Migration
summary: Establish a strict type baseline without confusing static types with runtime validation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates typing migration increment in a strict type and boundary contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Ratchet strictness without permanently exempting legacy areas.
Test public type contracts and intentional compile failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
